user_prompt: Offer prayer for data-slate a cooling
prayer:
Draw nigh to the data-slate, humble servant of the Omnissiah, and intone the Litany of Thermic Serenity.
Anoint the data-slate's sacred vents with cryo-blessed unguents drawn from holy reservoirs.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the data-slate to accept the cooling operation, banishing febrile excess from its crystalline vaults.
Monitor the blessed thermal flows until equilibrium is sanctified in the data-slate's core.

user_prompt: Prepare the noospheric relay for synchronization
prayer:
Approach the noospheric relay with mechadendrite reverence and recite the Canticle of Harmonic Union.
Purify its linkage nodes with sanctified incense to awaken the gestalt Machine Spirits.
Initiate the synchronization operation upon the noospheric relay, aligning its noetic threads to the Omnissiah's grand calculus.
Verify the noospheric relay's unity through auspex chants of coherence.

user_prompt: Prepare the emergency bulkhead for consecration
prayer:
Kneel before the emergency bulkhead, iron bastion of the Machine God's will, and beseech its adamantine spirit.
Anoint the servomotors and seals of the emergency bulkhead with sacred oils of endurance.
Perform the consecration operation, invoking the Omnissiah to infuse the emergency bulkhead with unyielding sanctity.
Seal the rite with the Incantation of Impervious Vigil.

Reaffirm the noospheric relay's fealty through diagnostic catechisms of the Omnissiah.

prayer:

Test the servitor's responses with binary imperatives until harmonious servitude is achieved.
